particulars.description: Fixed and floating charge over the undertaking and all property and assets present and future, including goodwill, book debts, uncalled capital, buildings, fixtures, fixed plant & machinery.

secured_details.description: All monies due or to become due from the company to the chargee under the terms of the aforementioned instrument creating or evidencing the charge
